artPrompt: The dramatic instant a giant six-sided die crashes onto cobblestones amid overturned ballot boxes, splitting open in a burst of flame-orange light from which fresh 1/1 goblins tumble out grinning, the die foreshortened huge toward the viewer. Coins and confetti scatter through the air, a bonfire glows behind in night-black smoke, ember sparks streaking, chaotic electoral mayhem. Rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Goblin Recount
text: Roll a six-sided die. Create a number of 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens equal to half the result, rounded up.
flavorText: They counted the ballots three times and got three different goblins.
